Flutter Pinball vendored web build

Source: https://github.com/flutter/pinball
Commit: feabc63d4de0d3f9a5f6038334d89a8baa5ed88b
Original project: Google I/O 2022 Pinball game built with Flutter and Firebase
License: MIT License, copyright (c) 2021 Very Good Ventures

This arcade embed uses a static web build with Firebase authentication, Firestore leaderboard persistence, service worker registration, and analytics scripts disabled for reliable offline/local play inside arcade.yuvrajkashyap.com.
